content:
hello <:H_immerse:1426122347643146250> i actually wrote it this for tulu but i think with what we now know of gtulu, the story suits him better <:Feelguilty:1400771618174664775> i didn't change his name though, as i would like to write a proper fic for gtulu when he releases <:M_satisfy:1400771690321154110> 
In any case this AU took a lot of planning and making its intricacies work but i quite like how it turned out, and i hope you will too <:wish:1356084702468899117> 

as always, if you read i hope you have a good time!

Synopsis: To understand a silent god, a scholar must become silent herself. Tris succeeded. Her thesis on Awakener Tulu is precise, devastating, and undeniable—a work that reorients an entire field. Her name will circulate in the world long after she stops answering it. She just can't remember why any of it mattered, or who she was before she began.

Contents: 
Chapter 1: The Subject
Chapter 2: The Proposal
Chapter 3: The Descent 
Chapter 4: The Consensus
Chapter 5: The Distance 
Chapter 6: The Spiral
Chapter 7: The Awakening
Chapter 8: The Momentum
Chapter 9: The Lie
Chapter 10: The Collapse
Chapter 11: The Erosion
Chapter 12: The Farewell 
The Thesis
Chapter 13: The Archive
Chapter 14: The Aftermath
Chapter 15: The End
